infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: BodyPilot uses the camera to scan food barcodes and analyze meals
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: BodyPilot reads Apple Health data such as steps, workouts, active energy, heart rate, and body weight to personalize fitness, nutrition, and recovery insights.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: BodyPilot can write workouts, body weight, and nutrition updates to Apple Health when you choose to sync them.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: BodyPilot uses your location during cardio sessions to calculate distance, pace, and route data.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: BodyPilot needs photo access for progress photos and meal logging
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: BodyPilot saves exported reports and progress images when you choose to share them.

plugins.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: BodyPilot reads Apple Health data such as steps, workouts, active energy, heart rate, and body weight to personalize fitness, nutrition, and recovery insights.
plugins.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: BodyPilot can write workouts, body weight, and nutrition updates to Apple Health when you choose to sync them.
